title: Lawmakers gather for annual picnic at White House: See photos
shortDescription: The annual bipartisan picnic brings together White House staff, members of Congress and their families at the White House.

title: After primary loss, Bill Cassidy bucks Trump, votes to end Iran war
shortDescription: On the heels of losing his primary election, Republican Sen. Bill Cassidy immediately bucked the leader of his party.

title: Trump’s $1.776 billion 'anti-weaponization' fund outrages critics
shortDescription: President Trump's critics are fuming after the DOJ announced a $1.776 billion fund that could compensate Trump allies, including Jan. 6 defendants.

title: Donald Trump Jr. wedding plans could happen soon
shortDescription: Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson could wed as soon as Memorial Day weekend, according to reports. Here’s what we know.

title: New deal bars IRS from auditing Trump, his family and businesses
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has been feuding with the IRS for many years over audits into whether he and his business empire paid enough taxes.

title: Trump tours White House ballroom construction site, shares new details
shortDescription: The president offered an impromptu tour of the ballroom construction site and talked about security and additional features.

title: Trump, WHO chief say they are 'concerned' about Ebola outbreak
shortDescription: Trump and health officials expressed concern about the deadly outbreak that has grown to more than 500 suspected cases in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

title: Democrats grill Blanche on new crime victims fund
shortDescription: Democrats questioned Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche on a new $1.77 billion fund to help victims of "lawfare and weaponization."

title: Trump says strike on Iran was an hour away
shortDescription: Trump says he was an hour away from ordering strikes on Iran, describing last-minute talks and warning action could still come.

title: Trump expresses confidence on a potential Cuba deal
shortDescription: Donald Trump says he is confident a deal with Cuba is possible and highlights support for Cuban Americans in Miami and across Florida.

title: Election results live: Gallrein defeats Massie in Kentucky, DDHQ, NBC report
shortDescription: President Trump has repeatedly criticized Republican Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky – and backed his challenger in a closely watched primary.

title: See when polls close in each state having elections on May 19
shortDescription: Voters in six states will determine the nominees for the November general election in primaries on May 19. Here's which ones and when you can vote.

title: Trump backs Texas attorney general in key Senate runoff that divided Republicans
shortDescription: President Trump made his endorsement in the Texas Republican primary runoff after staying neutral for months.

title: Senate control could come down to Georgia, NBC's Steve Kornacki says
shortDescription: USA TODAY spoke with NBC's Steve Kornacki on all things Georgia elections heading into election day on May 19. He has his eyes on the Senate primary.

title: Where, when to vote in Pittsburgh in PA's primary on Election Day
shortDescription: Curious about when to cast your vote in Pittsburgh in Pennsylvania's primary election? We have the key details.

title: Trump posts AI-generated images of handcuffed alien
shortDescription: Trump posted AI-generated images of himself beside a shackled alien after the Pentagon released what it described as “never-before-seen” UFO files.

title: Satire video game about Trump's war in Iran heads to Mar-a-Lago area
shortDescription: The Secret Handshake has installed statues in protest of the Trump administration in DC. For the first time, their creation is heading to Florida.

title: Trump says he's 'concerned' about Ebola
shortDescription: President Donald Trump was asked if he was concerned about the Ebola outbreak after an American tested positive for the virus.

title: Daily Briefing: Which states have May 19 elections?
shortDescription: Six states hold elections in a consequential day for midterms. Here is the news to know on Tuesday.

title: Trump wants White House helipad while Mar-a-Lago's sparks 'anxiety'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is reportedly considering a helipad for the White House South Lawn. The helipad at Mar-a-Lago is tightly regulated by the town.

title: Trump considers 'another big hit' on Iran after delaying strikes. Live
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is considering 'another big hit on Iran' despite a new peace proposal and growing war unpopularity.

title: Will Trump's revenge tour determine key primaries in the South?
shortDescription: Primaries in Kentucky, Georgia and Alabama will test the power of Donald Trump's endorsements. Pennsylvania, Idaho and Oregon also vote May 19

title: Jackson warns of Supreme Court appearing partisan in election cases
shortDescription: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson amplified her concern about the appearance of partisanship in the court's recent Voting Rights Act decision.

title: Trump wants investigation into Maryland ballot mix up, jabs Gov. Wes Moore
shortDescription: Some voters received a ballot for the wrong party ahead of the June 23 primary election, the Maryland State Board of Elections said last week.

title: Trump calls off Iran strikes for 'a little while'
shortDescription: Trump said Monday he put off a planned attack on Iran for "a little while, hopefully, maybe forever" at the request of U.S. allies in the Middle East.
